title: AI-Based Disease Spread Prediction During Arbaeen
desc: GNN approach for modeling infectious disease spread in large crowd gatherings using epidemiological data.

title: Multilingual NLP Text Classification Paper
desc: Parameter-efficient transformers for multilingual text classification targeting Q1 journal publication.

title: Introduction to Big Data Analytics
desc: Lecture slides and materials covering Hadoop, Spark, and distributed computing frameworks for large-scale data.

title: Hands-on Machine Learning with Python
desc: Workshop materials including notebooks and exercises on supervised and unsupervised learning techniques.

desc: Hybrid NLP and graph learning framework mapping research publications to UN Sustainable Development Goals.

title: Deep Learning for Medical Image Analysis
desc: CNN-based architectures for automated diagnosis from medical imaging data using transfer learning.

title: Advanced Topics in Artificial Intelligence
desc: Graduate-level lecture series on reinforcement learning, meta-learning, and neural architecture search.
